content_body: My friends and I had a wonderful reunion and can't wait to have another. When it has been 35 plus years there is a lot of catching up to do! The cabin is beautiful; you and your team did a fantastic job. The only possible thing we could have asked for would be a couple of more chairs for our group of nine. We loved the table! Beautiful. We enjoyed everything, including the rain, the leaves changing color before our eyes and the train passing by which was an unexpected delight. We are already thinking we will return next fall. By the way, we appreciated the cleanliness so much. It is hard to tell when you only have pictures but your website is true to its word. I will definitely recommend your cabins to others. Thanks for everything.
title: Appreciated Everything!
